subject: Fronded team-member closeout under Lanternlit topology
body: Team member closeout: Boundary owned: Fronded support and watcher under Lanternlit routing; no source claim. Outcome: topology change recorded, Mistbound confirmed as Commit Marshal, and Fronded stood down from the mistaken marshal move. Evidence: topology broadcast 87c29697; direct-to-Lanternlit 51328504; claims mine returned []; git diff --staged returned empty; watcher saw Seaworthy tick #4 route R2 fan-out to Mistbound. Claims / queue / git state: no active Fronded claims; no staged files; prior marshal intent abandoned; worktree remains dirty with shared comms plus Scorched R2 source edits not owned by Fronded. Surprise or changed understanding: stale marshal-vacancy substrate must not outrank fresh owner correction; logged in napkin. Blockers or risks: earlier commit attempt hit .git/index.lock Operation not permitted; Mistbound as Commit Marshal is expected to investigate. Handoff needed: Fronded now reports directly to Lanternlit and remains support-only until directed.
